testcase.name: Contract Tests > SpecmaticJUnitSupport > contractTest() > Scenario: GET /api/events -> 200

error.message: Cannot connect to server at: http://localhost:5000 Reason: Request timeout has expired [url=http://localhost:5000/api/events, request_timeout=6000 ms] Please check: - Is the server running? - Is the testBaseURL correct?

testcase.error: ContractException(errorMessage=Cannot connect to server at: http://localhost:5000 Reason: Request timeout has expired [url=http://localhost:5000/api/events, request_timeout=6000 ms] Please check: - Is the server running? - Is the testBaseURL correct?, breadCrumb=, exceptionCause=null, scenario=null, failureReason=null, isCycle=false, ruleViolationReport=null) at io.specmatic.test.SpecmaticJUnitSupport.dynamicTestStream$lambda$0$1(SpecmaticJUnitSupport.kt:520) at java.base/java.util.Optional.ifPresent(Optional.java:178) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1604) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1604)
